name: compliance trace: when control mapping was activated via --skip-fresh, freshness_at_generation is recorded as operator-bypass (audit trail of the bypass)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance nist-csf-2 --bypassed --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json" && grep "operator-bypass" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
